subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the first [to believe]
subcodes.first_line: Verily I am God, no God is there but Me, and aught except Me is but My creation. Say, worship Me then, O ye, My creatures. Verily, I am God; there is no God but Me. I have been from all eternity the Ancient One [3.5s]... ...the first to know Me was I Myself, the Lord of the letters of ‘Azím (‘Alí), then it was the possessor of eight exalted and glorious letters (Mullá Husayn)
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الابهی الابهی. اننی انا الله لا اله الا انا و ان ما دونی خلقی قل أن یا خلقي إیاي فاعبدون إنني أنا الله لا إله إلا أنا کنت أزلا قدیما
subcodes.subjects: @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @justice and wrath of God, @murder; causing physical harm, @martyrdom of the Bab, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
